text_block_list.text:
Although it's time for her training session, Biwa
Hayahide hasn't shown up, so I decide to search
for her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... I'm so glad you asked.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There’s a salon that's holding a special promotion
to help tame "extremely voluminous hair," so I
tried it out!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I had five millimeters taken off, and it's really
helped reduce wind resistance! I'm sure today's
training will be—
choice_data_list: Um, it's a bit late for that.
Um, it's a bit late for that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh my goodness! When did it get so late?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I was so focused on short-term
improvement that I lost sight of my
responsibilities!

She seems genuinely sorry, so I tell her to take
the day off and come back tomorrow for training.
